mnemonics: Prisoner's Dilemma: Punish the cheater, Cooperate for gains
Rock-Paper-Scissors: Rock beats scissors, scissors beats paper, paper beats rock
keyPoints: A Nash equilibrium occurs when no player can improve their payoff by unilaterally changing their strategy
It is a stable state where all players are satisfied with their actions
Examples include the Prisoner's Dilemma, Rock-Paper-Scissors, and the Chicken Game
